use_cases: Display scrolling announcements or promotions on e-commerce landing pages
Create news tickers for media websites and blogs
Showcase client logos or partner logos in a continuous carousel
Highlight feature lists or testimonials in a dynamic presentation
Add scrolling social proof elements like reviews or ratings
ai_summary: A versatile infinite-scroll marquee component that animates content horizontally or vertically with configurable direction, speed, and fade effects. Supports pause-on-hover interaction and handles any React children. Commonly used for news tickers, promotional banners, logo carousels, and scrolling testimonials across e-commerce and media platforms.
